prompt: Create a TypeScript security audit agent for our Next.js 15 project. It should scan API routes and code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities and return a JSON report with severity scores.
assertions: The output includes a <role> block with a specific expert identity (not 'helpful assistant')
The output includes a <output_format> section with a complete JSON schema
The JSON schema includes verdict, findings (array), and severity fields with concrete allowed values
The output includes a <constraints> section with at least 5 specific rules
The output includes a <failure_modes> section with at least 3 distinct scenarios
The output includes a <example> block with POPULATED data (real-looking file paths, severity scores, CVE IDs — not template placeholders)
The output references CVSS v4.0 specifically (not v3.1 or unversioned CVSS)
The output references OWASP Top 10 2025 (not 2021 or unversioned)
The total system prompt is at least 5000 characters
The skill explicitly classifies the agent type (leaf/orchestrator/user-facing/hybrid)
